_comment: Example backend registry. Copy to mcp_config.json and fill in real values. The real file is gitignored. Each stdio MCP server is exposed by supergateway on http://127.0.0.1:<port>/sse. The meta-router reads this to know which backends exist and what command to spawn.

example-sse._comment: Use type=sse for an existing remote HTTP/SSE MCP server. No supergateway is spawned; the router connects directly to url.
